Hitler was cremated after his suicide in April 1945, and the ashes were then scattered in Berlin. Because of this, there is no burial site for Adolf Hitler. The ashes were allegedly scattered in one of the meadows near the Berghof, Hitler's residence in Obersalzberg, in Bavaria, although different sources may give slightly different locations. The exact location of Hitler's remains has never been definitively established and has often remained a subject of controversy and historical debate.
